title: Parameter horizontal ruler drag boundary consumption closure

implemented: Consume drag movement before cooldown/value-application checks
Prevent residual translation accumulation at min/max boundaries
Reset step cooldown when drag direction changes
Clear drag direction state when gestures end
Apply the fix to bottom parameter horizontal ruler
Apply the fix to Manual Focus ruler

problem_cause.summary: Drag translation could remain unconsumed when cooldown or boundary conditions prevented a value change.
effects: outward boundary drags left residual translation
reverse drags first had to offset stale residual
users felt they had to swipe the opposite direction before the original direction worked again

residual_risks: Physical-device validation is still required for WB/TINT/EV/ISO/Shutter and MF boundary behavior.
Lens zoom ruler was not changed because it was outside this package's required coverage.
next_package: R62 parameter drag boundary device recheck and minimal threshold tuning if needed
